description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The front features a paved walkway leading to a recessed entryway, flanked by landscaped greenery. Large glass windows are visible on one side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house includes a small swimming pool set into a grassy yard. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color with darker trim accents, and the roof appears to be constructed from concrete or similar material. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped front yard, and a backyard pool, enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved path, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roof and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass windows and the backyard pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, grassy yard, and the house's overall rectangular layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with paved walkway, minimal overhang, and landscaped flanking greenery
